How this site is built

Stack, fonts, hosting, and the decisions behind the design.

Built with

Generator
Astro
Interactivity
Vue 3 islands where needed
CSS
Vanilla CSS — no frameworks, no utilities
Types
TypeScript throughout

Deployed to

Host
Netlify
CI/CD
Netlify — auto-deploy from main

Typography

Display
Oswald
Condensed
Barlow Condensed
Body
Barlow

Colors

Background
#111
Border
#333
Text primary
#fff
Text secondary
#aaa

Accessibility

Standard
WCAG 2.2 AA
HTML
Semantic HTML5 throughout
Screen readers
Tested with NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver
Input
Fully keyboard navigable
Motion
Respects prefers-reduced-motion

Design

Aesthetic
Dark editorial — inspired by print magazine layouts
Analytics
None
Tracking
None
Ads
None
